This test checks that hovering an import path renders doc links in the imported
package documentation using that package's file and package context.

-- settings.json --
{
	"hoverKind": "FullDocumentation"
}

-- go.mod --
module example.com/doclinksimport

go 1.20

-- p.go --
package p

import _ "example.com/doclinksimport/dep" //@hover(`"example.com/doclinksimport/dep"`, `"example.com/doclinksimport/dep"`, dep)

-- dep/dep.go --
// Package dep links to [json.Marshal] and [Thing].
package dep

import "encoding/json"

var _ = json.Marshal

type Thing struct{}

-- @dep --
```go
package dep
```

---

Package dep links to [json.Marshal](https://pkg.go.dev/encoding/json#Marshal) and [Thing](https://pkg.go.dev/example.com/doclinksimport/dep#Thing).
